name: omarchy_shell_functions
content:
She Functions 
Omarchy comes with a set of she functions to simpify common tasks and encapsuate
convouted parameter cas.
• compress [file.tar.gz]  / decompress [file.tar.gz] : Create or expand a tar.gz
fie.
• iso2sd [image.iso] [/path/to/sdcard] : Create a bootabe drive on an SD card
using the referenced iso fie.
• format-drive [/dev/drive] : Format an entire disk with a singe exFAT partition
(which works on Windows and macOS too). Be carefu!
• img2jpg : Turn any image into a near-fu quaity jpg.
• img2jpg-small : Turn any image into near-fu quaity 1080p-wide jpg.
• img2png : Turn any image into a ossy-compressed PNG.
Shell Functions · The Omarchy Manual · DHH https://learn.omacom.io/2/the-omarchy-manual/58/shell-functions
